purpose: Define the first deterministic release proof-pack surface produced by scripts/proof_runner.py.
fail_closed_rules: missing source artifacts set verdict to fail_closed
embedded proof console verdict other than pass sets verdict to fail_closed
tracker summary includes counts and hashes only, not raw issue rows
output directory writes index.json plus copied source artifacts under source_artifacts/
generated JSON is byte-stable with sorted keys
validation_commands: rch exec -- env CARGO_INCREMENTAL=0 CARGO_TARGET_DIR=${TMPDIR:-/tmp}/rch_target_release_proof_pack_contract CARGO_PROFILE_TEST_DEBUG=0 RUSTFLAGS='-C debuginfo=0' cargo test -p asupersync --test proof_runner_contract -- --nocapture
